venv_torch_info.cmd:
/home/cfregly/ai-performance-engineering/code/cluster/env/venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import json
import torch
payload = {
  'torch': torch.__version__,
  'cuda': torch.version.cuda,
  'git': getattr(torch.version, 'git_version', None),
  'nccl': None,
}
try:
  payload['nccl'] = torch.cuda.nccl.version()
except Exception as exc:
  payload['nccl'] = f'<error: {exc}>'
print(json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True))
EOF
